# Long drive line (both endpoints past the graph edge that it crosses).
# The splice vertex at x≈180.3 should land at the exact same precise
# coordinate as in the short-line variant.

polygon outer
0,0
300,0
300,200
0,200
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

drive-line
50,100
250,100
----
drive-line: 50,100 -> 250,100

generate
----
total_stalls: 68

graph vertices
----
vertices: 18
  0: (27.910, 172.090)
  1: (27.910, 27.910)
  2: (272.090, 27.910)
  3: (272.090, 172.090)
  4: (223.279, 27.910)
  5: (223.279, 172.090)
  6: (167.459, 27.910)
  7: (167.459, 172.090)
  8: (111.640, 27.910)
  9: (111.640, 172.090)
  10: (55.820, 27.910)
  11: (55.820, 172.090)
  12: (27.910, 100)
  13: (55.820, 100)
  14: (111.640, 100)
  15: (167.459, 100)
  16: (223.279, 100)
  17: (272.090, 100)

snapshot
----
